title: thelypteris royenii
intro: Thelypteris royenii, also known as the royal maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and parts of the Pacific. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Thelypteris royenii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris royenii can be made into infusions, teas, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
